svg.text: ADC PURE DC AI FACTORY CASSETTE
INTERIOR FLOOR PLAN — TOP VIEW · Scale: 1 ft = 30 px · Enclosure: 40' × 8' × 9'6" · CONFIDENTIAL — ADC / FIBREBOND · 2026-04-08
FRONT AISLE — SERVICE ACCESS VIA TOP PANELS (~2.5 ft)
REAR CLEARANCE — POWER / COOLING SERVICE (~1.6 ft)
RACK ROW — 10 × NVIDIA NVL72 (Vera Rubin Max P)
2,300 kW IT Load · 72 GPUs/rack · 288 GB HBM4/GPU · 20.7 TB HBM4/rack · OCP ORV3
Flexible Drops — Staubli UQD to each rack
NVIDIA NVL72 (OCP ORV3, 230 kW, Vera Rubin Max P)
Eaton ORV3 Power Sidecar (800 kW, ±400V DC)
CDU / Pumps / HX (Boyd, 2,000 kW, N+1 pumps)
PDU / SSCB (main disc., GF protect., metering)
QM9700 NDR InfiniBand Switch / Jetson BMS
1. Overhead elements (busbar, cooling headers, VESDA, suppression) projected onto floor plan.
2. Enclosure: 40' × 8' × 9'6" ISO external dims — purpose-built steel, not a converted container.
3. All site connections at External Connection Panel (right end) — single-face, four connections.
4. Rack depth shown ~1,068 mm (42"). Internal clearances to be confirmed by Fibrebond.
5. Bus conductor sizing: 3,774A nameplate (3,019A × 1.25 — NEC 210.19(A)(1) continuous load rule).
6. IT racks shipped empty from Minden. Server hardware installed on-site post-placement.
7. Wind: ASCE 7-22, Risk Cat. III, 150 mph. Anchor bolt pattern per Fibrebond structural eng.
8. Coolant: water-glycol type, concentration, and inhibitor pkg. to be specified (Boyd + NVIDIA req.).
9. NEC 110.26 working space: front aisle ~30" — confirm compliance with Fibrebond / AHJ.
CONFIDENTIAL — ADC / FIBREBOND ENGINEERING USE ONLY · scott@adc3k.com · (337) 780-1535
